description_long: This object is a stylized, pixelated loaf of bread with a rectangular shape and slightly indented top corners, reminiscent of classic video game graphics. The front and back faces display a mottled golden-brown color, simulating the appearance of a baked crust with subtle variations in tone. The edges are outlined in a darker brown, suggesting a well-baked, slightly crisp crust. The side views reveal the bread's thin profile, indicating it is a single slice rather than a full loaf. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or scoring marks, and the surface appears smooth and uniform. The object lacks any branding, packaging, or labeling, and appears to be a simple, unsliced piece of bread.
description: A pixelated, golden-brown slice of bread with a darker crust and a smooth, uniform surface. The object is thin and rectangular, with no visible seeds or markings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full face of the bread slice, with a golden-brown center and a darker brown crust outlining the edges.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the bread's very thin profile, emphasizing its flatness and lack of depth.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying the same golden-brown face and dark crust outline.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the thinness of the bread, with no additional features visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is visually represented by a darker brown outline around the edges, with no visible scoring, seeds, or flour dusting. The pattern is simple and uniform, matching the stylized, pixelated aesthetic.
